commands.review_summary:
The PR moves memory search, memory backend, dreaming, Memory Wiki, QMD startup, memory prompt/citation behavior, docs, tests, and related secret/config surfaces into agent-scoped memory configuration.

Reproducibility: yes. for the current blocking test defect: source inspection at the PR head shows the writer emits `agents.defaults.memory.search` while the focused test still reads `agents.defaults.memorySearch`. I did not run the test because this review must keep the checkout read-only.
